message:
feat(web): Add responsive mobile rendering with touch scrolling

Implements aggressive responsive cell sizing for mobile devices:
- Pixel-level cells (3x3px) for tiny phones (<320px)
- Progressive scaling up to comfortable desktop sizes (15x18px)
- Dynamic glyph atlas rebuilding on viewport resize
- Auto-calculated font sizes, with text skipped for tiny cells

Touch scrolling support:
- Touch start/move/end handlers in VirtualScroller
- Momentum scrolling with velocity tracking
- Event wiring in useSequenceGrid hook
- Proper passive/non-passive event listener flags

This enables usable genome visualization on any screen size, with
pure color visualization on mobile and full text on desktop.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
